message:
fix(ci): Fix macOS and Windows NAPI linking with dynamic_lookup

- Add .cargo/config.toml with platform-specific linker flags
- macOS: Use -undefined dynamic_lookup for runtime symbol resolution
- Windows: Use /FORCE:UNRESOLVED for undefined symbols
- Change npm ci to npm install (no package-lock.json)
- Add MACOSX_DEPLOYMENT_TARGET=10.13

This allows NAPI symbols to be resolved at runtime by Node.js instead
of requiring them at link time.

files.patch:
@@ -105,7 +105,7 @@ jobs:
 
       - name: Install dependencies
         working-directory: packages/agentic-jujutsu
-        run: npm ci
+        run: npm install
 
       - name: Build native module
         working-directory: packages/agentic-jujutsu
@@ -114,6 +114,7 @@ jobs:
           CARGO_TARGET_AARCH64_UNKNOWN_LINUX_GNU_LINKER: aarch64-linux-gnu-gcc
           CARGO_TARGET_AARCH64_UNKNOWN_LINUX_MUSL_LINKER: aarch64-linux-gnu-gcc
           CARGO_TARGET_ARMV7_UNKNOWN_LINUX_GNUEABIHF_LINKER: arm-linux-gnueabihf-gcc
+          MACOSX_DEPLOYMENT_TARGET: '10.13'
 
       - name: Find built .node files (debug)
         working-directory: packages/agentic-jujutsu
@@ -203,7 +204,7 @@ jobs:
 
       - name: Install dependencies
         working-directory: packages/agentic-jujutsu
-        run: npm ci
+        run: npm install
 
       - name: Create platform packages
         working-directory: packages/agentic-jujutsu
